---
title: "Chuoi Fourier bang truc giac hinh hoc"
date: 2026-06-13
categories: [math, visualization]
description: "Mo ta cach tong hop song bang cac thanh phan sin va cos, kem image va animation."
image: ../../assets/images/posts/fourier-series/cover.svg
lang: vi
---

Day la bai mau cho luong cong viec viet blog ve toan.

## Y tuong

Ta co the xay dung mot dang song phuc tap bang cach cong cac thanh phan co tan so khac nhau.

![](../../assets/images/posts/fourier-series/cover.svg)

## Animation

Khi co animation render san, co the nhung truc tiep tu `assets/animations/rendered/`.
